user.title: C-Bus Connection
user.description: Connect to your C-Bus network via a CNI (TCP) or PCI (serial) interface.

tcp.title: TCP Connection
tcp.description: Enter the IP address and port of your C-Bus CNI.

serial.title: Serial Connection
serial.description: Enter the serial port of your C-Bus PCI.

abort.already_configured: This C-Bus network is already configured.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to C-Bus interface.
